title: Fashion Traveler Portrait AI

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Candid high-end smartphone vacation portrait built around fashion traveler with windswept auburn hair, freckles, and relaxed vacation confidence, cream crochet sun hat, turquoise fitted T-shirt under a lightweight open linen overshirt, coral high-waisted linen shorts, and stacked silver bracelets, and volcanic dune path near an Atlantic beach in bright noon light. Subject: fashion traveler with windswept auburn hair, freckles, and relaxed vacation confidence appears as the travel portrait subject with candid confidence, believable anatomy, relaxed posture, and polished resort styling. Visible styling: cream crochet sun hat, turquoise fitted T-shirt under a lightweight open linen overshirt, coral high-waisted linen shorts, and stacked silver bracelets. Scene: volcanic dune path near an Atlantic beach in bright noon light anchors the image with bright sand dunes, harsh direct daylight, authentic vacation atmosphere, and natural outdoor shadows. Composition: Fixed vertical candid outdoor snapshot: the subject standing on a sand dune, casual front-facing vacation pose, hat casting partial forehead shadow, visible resort outfit styling, one hand holding wrapped lime ice pop held casually in one hand, and smartphone-like framing with natural crop. Signature Elements: wrapped lime ice pop held casually in one hand adds the casual vacation action while the headwear, dune setting, direct daylight, and raw smartphone-photo finish preserve the source visual identity. Style: High-quality smartphone camera aesthetic with raw vacation-photo realism, natural grain, unsoftened daylight, candid travel-fashion energy, and editorial-quality clarity without studio smoothness. Color Palette: Fixed sunlit sand beige, warm natural complexion tones, bright sky accents, resort-outfit color accents from cream crochet sun hat, turquoise fitted T-shirt under a lightweight open linen overshirt, coral high-waisted linen shorts, and stacked silver bracelets, ice-pop color from wrapped lime ice pop held casually in one hand, white or pale fabric, and strong daylight contrast. Lighting: Direct unsoftened sunlight with strong natural shadows, readable facial structure, crisp fabric highlights, and realistic highlight texture on hat, jewelry, sand, and ice pop. Camera: High-quality smartphone snapshot feeling with slight natural grain, crisp central subject, authentic vacation perspective, and shallow environmental depth from dunes behind. Materials: Textured cap fabric, linen cover-up, resort-wear fabric, metallic bracelet, sand grain, wind-touched hair, and melting ice pop remain visible. Restrictions: Keep the image fashion-editorial and non-explicit, maintain coherent anatomy, natural styling, readable hat detail, clear beach environment, and authentic vacation snapshot style.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
